textByHash.60afb2853592a7aaf9ce991afb0aa2f137c2fe66: Hello. You should talk to the lead navigator.
textByHash.0f899c4a584158e0918f3c2f39f97eae96705357: Well done, sibling. I knew you'd manage to get a 'not guilty' verdict, but to lure this cretin here as well...
textByHash.8658221168adf4e88c7283f29d1d93ce3145dc08: What can I say, I'm impressed.
textByHash.532651892d35ae36b9c5d7eb6d38ed2a20542b14: Most definitely. Have someone go and fetch her.
textByHash.258b6524b249a14f786725ca39ba6d445455657c: And? Make this quick, I have better things to do than be interrogated by halfwits all day.
textByHash.31b0ff6ca69e2a2f899d22d1ea976384423e384f: I don't really know or care. Frankly, the old man deserved to die.
textByHash.f1f2cefcbd33de545ef16d2206d0f0bf0a13a1d6: There was a suspicious red headed man who came to the house the other day selling poison now I think about it. Last I saw he was headed towards the tavern in the Seers village.
textByHash.984d87244effd52fd5ad1ae77ed0fc40deac60d7: That is none of your business. Are we finished now, or are you just going to stand there irritating me with your idiotic questions all day?
textByHash.ed1c032655c5e91461a37a06bbb1bfe3c7ddb8f7: No. Can I go yet? Your face irritates me.
textByHash.744b24144e4ee6ebd5f38dc3691b9e3c8741f450: There was a nest of spiders upstairs between the two servants' quarters. Obviously I had to kill them before our pathetic servants whined at my father some more.
textByHash.469229939a47277a41e83d5f775864970d2f635a: Honestly, it's like they expect to be treated like royalty! If I had my way I would fire the whole workshy lot of them!
textByHash.7811ab7345c38fdbfbb95b3cc232143477bef1f5: Apparently you aren't as stupid as you look.
textByHash.fe2e1e7e47a32f50ee706b604cf6140da629e2ef: Build us a stove mate, I'm absolutely starvin!
textByHash.a2513d0cc7defb21f2a6be1bc639c4cdae5ae572: ...So my expertise were not required this time, a man's still gotta eat.
textByHash.f9a7245b32b003b3dd6ee6cee6c1f3637b6b609a: About these eggs... Odd colour, don't cha think?
textByHash.6cc90d242935ff674d284b2f4128090f8bd303fd: Hmm, well, good effort, but I'll pass on the grub this time.
textByHash.2de38b9fa70855ed88a722fbe2dd4a1938a7c0f4: I'm not sure that'll change my mind.
textByHash.bd435b80baa4dc808a4e5e38ab3a9eb88ce509e9: For the love of Saradomin, please leave me be
textByHash.e1b174c2c47b273f2fb57e3269e9ccbb1450f057: Hello, young adventurer. What brings you to the Museum's paleontology floor?
textByHash.7a056e6ccb2091808c3d322fa6c3a04522085092: I'm glad you asked! Paleontology is the study of prehistoric lifeforms in Gielinor through the examination of fossils.
textByHash.adb060433b3d6e6a36892b9ceda3c127ca669d79: We use fossils to try determine several things: information about what fossil belonged to, what the environment was like, and try to uncover secrets of Gielinor's past.
textByHash.9bc07d0564c77950a50c1bd939a1e8f5abd96c09: What else would you like to know?
textByHash.44aa715bd0da00d9c70e5059c16c981277867b85: Ah, brilliant question. Fossils of creatures are found in sedimentary rock, we use specialised tools to carefully remove the unwanted rock only leaving only the fossil behind.
textByHash.2e9c34138000f23fe850396113c8b998658a105f: If you're looking for fossils yourself, I hear there is a voyage to a mysterious island to discover new types of fossil.
textByHash.c5822728394d46410b69d6591dd233f5198de763: You should speak to the Curator as he knows more about it than I.
textByHash.9e60e950d03881d54e70f6134e8f27a2428ad4bb: Is there anything else you need help with?
textByHash.58191014f6c6f9a5d451fb501856d046922accf9: Any fossils you find can be added to the surrounding display cases.
textByHash.14a10c1bd146adc6af93943176d2fa632e0dfe81: If you manage to complete display case, the Museum will ensure you are rewarded for your efforts.
textByHash.6d60deedc6b3574a4cbc2a50f420c074c8222c08: Also, if you find any rare fossils on your travels, make sure you hold onto them. Something tells me they will be very valuable in the future...
textByHash.3c16185e66ac2fcea8d95a431852e014d84d1958: Do you have any other questions?
textByHash.612754504c557ab6da68a61bf3d2f95ac7e9105e: It looks like the Museum doesn't have any complete fossil displays yet. I could only speculate on what they will contain.
textByHash.ea6d999b7ba77fca22f10c2b8a05d32c0a33b1da: Of course. Which display would you like to ask about?
textByHash.0eda66bb3504e254a372e8c85fcfd29e346b812d: Um... yes. It's an interesting specimen isn't it?
textByHash.b5bc44af618f2ca488458100acfe0f9ff6a3fbd3: Um... yes, but I couldn't possibly share that information right now.
textByHash.f2b0d9410a8cdabbb09050ea2276de96a2a6016e: It's an interesting specimen isn't it? It appears that the specimen is thousands of years old!
textByHash.ba64208d4f903f6f13ee2d021d2947fa79de1c02: Well that's what the analysis from the fossil shows.
textByHash.ff8230fe7bc5accec9a19458480dc70fbfd72a0d: What did you ask about again?
